testcase.name: test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-128-12]

failure.message: AssertionError: real layer12 prefill routing S=128: 0.977706544840909 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 12, seq_len = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("seq_len", [128, 129, 2048]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, seq_len, ): """Qualify aligned, non-aligned, and bounded-long real-weight prefill."""
del device_params path = _precision_reference_path(layer_idx, seq_len) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_precision_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) max_cache_len = seq_len + 1 with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=max_cache_len, optimization_config=_precision_optimization_variant(), ) physical_blocks = list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks))) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(physical_blocks) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(61000 + layer_idx * 10000 + seq_len) hidden = torch.randn( (1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) token = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) attention_output = decoder._prefill_attention( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len, ) _assert_pcc( reference["attention_output"], _replicated_host(attention_output), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} attention residual S={seq_len}", ) prefill_routing = _prefill_routing(decoder, attention_output, seq_len) prefill_routing_host = _replicated_host(prefill_routing) > _assert_pcc( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:2148: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[0.0000, 0.2354, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.1982, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.1816, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.2363, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[0.0000, 0.2354, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.1982, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.1836, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.2324, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99, label = 'real layer12 prefill routing S=128'
def _assert_pcc(reference: torch.Tensor, actual: torch.Tensor, threshold: float, label: str): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) print(f"{label}: {message}") > assert passed, f"{label}: {message}" E AssertionError: real layer12 prefill routing S=128: 0.977706544840909 E assert False
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:105: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-128-13]

failure.message: AssertionError: real layer13 prefill routing S=128: 0.9747194492560016 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 13, seq_len = 128
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("seq_len", [128, 129, 2048]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, seq_len, ): """Qualify aligned, non-aligned, and bounded-long real-weight prefill."""
del device_params path = _precision_reference_path(layer_idx, seq_len) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_precision_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) max_cache_len = seq_len + 1 with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=max_cache_len, optimization_config=_precision_optimization_variant(), ) physical_blocks = list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks))) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(physical_blocks) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(61000 + layer_idx * 10000 + seq_len) hidden = torch.randn( (1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) token = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) attention_output = decoder._prefill_attention( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len, ) _assert_pcc( reference["attention_output"], _replicated_host(attention_output), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} attention residual S={seq_len}", ) prefill_routing = _prefill_routing(decoder, attention_output, seq_len) prefill_routing_host = _replicated_host(prefill_routing) > _assert_pcc( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:2148: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.2852, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.2471, 0.0000, ..., 0.3008, 0.2148, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.2832, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.2471, 0.0000, ..., 0.3008, 0.2188, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99, label = 'real layer13 prefill routing S=128'
def _assert_pcc(reference: torch.Tensor, actual: torch.Tensor, threshold: float, label: str): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) print(f"{label}: {message}") > assert passed, f"{label}: {message}" E AssertionError: real layer13 prefill routing S=128: 0.9747194492560016 E assert False
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:105: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-129-12]

failure.message: AssertionError: real layer12 prefill routing S=129: 0.9787110528958326 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 12, seq_len = 129
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @pytest.mark.parametrize("seq_len", [128, 129, 2048]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_precision_lengths_match_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, seq_len, ): """Qualify aligned, non-aligned, and bounded-long real-weight prefill."""
del device_params path = _precision_reference_path(layer_idx, seq_len) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_precision_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) max_cache_len = seq_len + 1 with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=max_cache_len, optimization_config=_precision_optimization_variant(), ) physical_blocks = list(reversed(range(decoder.num_cache_blocks))) page_table = decoder.create_page_table(physical_blocks) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(61000 + layer_idx * 10000 + seq_len) hidden = torch.randn( (1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) token = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) attention_output = decoder._prefill_attention( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len, ) _assert_pcc( reference["attention_output"], _replicated_host(attention_output), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} attention residual S={seq_len}", ) prefill_routing = _prefill_routing(decoder, attention_output, seq_len) prefill_routing_host = _replicated_host(prefill_routing) > _assert_pcc( reference["prefill_routing"], prefill_routing_host, 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill routing S={seq_len}", )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:2148: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[0.0000, 0.2207, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2021], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.2578, 0.0000, 0.2109, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.2480, 0.0000], [0.2051, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[0.0000, 0.2197, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.2041], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.2578, 0.0000, 0.2080, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], ..., [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000], [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.2480, 0.0000], [0.2061, 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99, label = 'real layer12 prefill routing S=129'
def _assert_pcc(reference: torch.Tensor, actual: torch.Tensor, threshold: float, label: str): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) print(f"{label}: {message}") > assert passed, f"{label}: {message}" E AssertionError: real layer12 prefill routing S=129: 0.9787110528958326 E assert False
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:105: AssertionError
